description: Risk register for the ROWS system. Tracks risks relevant to multi-agent development.

risks.title: Duplicate work
risks.description: Two workers may claim overlapping tasks or modify the same files.
risks.mitigation: Advisory locks in agent-os/locks/. Workers check locks before claiming.

risks.title: Stale handoff
risks.description: A worker fails to write a handoff, losing session context.
risks.mitigation: Handoff requirement in worker contract. CI checks for handoff presence.

risks.title: Unclear goal
risks.description: PROJECT_GOAL.md is vague, causing workers to make incorrect assumptions.
risks.mitigation: Guided intake form in PROJECT_GOAL.md. Workers escalate ambiguity.

risks.title: Fake completion
risks.description: A worker marks a task done without actually completing it or without verification.
risks.mitigation: No worker can self-close. Independent verification required. Definition of done gates.

risks.title: File collision
risks.description: Two workers modify the same file causing merge conflicts.
risks.mitigation: Advisory locks declare expected files. Small, focused tasks reduce collision surface.

risks.title: Over-reliance on one worker
risks.description: A project becomes dependent on a single AI tool, creating a bottleneck if that tool is unavailable.
risks.mitigation: Worker replaceability rule. Handoffs enable any worker to continue. Capability-based routing.

risks.title: Private-memory dependency
risks.description: A task depends on context stored only in a specific AI's chat memory, making reassignment impossible.
risks.mitigation: Private memory ban. All context must be in repo files. Handoffs required before reassignment.

risks.title: Stale reassignment
risks.description: A task is reassigned but the new worker never picks it up, or the reassignment record is lost.
risks.mitigation: Reassignment records in agent-os/reassignment/. Stale lock recovery policy. Human oversight.

risks.title: Unverified solo-worker completion
risks.description: In solo mode, a worker self-approves work without independent verification.
risks.mitigation: Solo workers must not self-close. Automated validation required. Human approval required.

risks.title: Incorrect capability routing
risks.description: A task is routed to a worker that lacks the required capabilities.
risks.mitigation: Capability registry. Task template requires capability declarations. Workers self-check capability fit.
